635| // fileExistsOnRemoteBranch checks if a file exists in the metadata branch tree on a bare remote.
636| func fileExistsOnRemoteBranch(t *testing.T, bareDir, filePath string) bool {
637| 	t.Helper()
638| 
639| 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(t.Context(), "git", "cat-file", "-t", paths.MetadataBranchName+":"+filePath)
640| 	cmd.Dir = bareDir
641| 	cmd.Env = testutil.GitIsolatedEnv()
642| 	return cmd.Run() == nil
643| }
